nasb.text: “Know, then, it is not because of your righteousness that the Lord your God is giving you this good land to possess, for you are a stubborn people.

esv.text: “Know, therefore, that the Lord your God is not giving you this good land to possess because of your righteousness, for you are a stubborn people.

cnv.text: 你要知道，耶和華你的　神把這美地賜給你作產業，並不是因著你的義；你本來是頑固的民族。

ccb.text: 你们要知道，耶和华赐给你们那佳美之地不是因为你们有好品德。其实你们是顽固不化的人。
